all_candidates.topic: Does the NEET re-exam result restore faith in the examination system?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The National Testing Agency (NTA) released the NEET Re-exam results on July 16-17, 2026, with 11.21 lakh candidates qualifying.

all_candidates.topic: Is reintroducing UPI charges for large merchants a good move?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 17, 2026, the government is reportedly considering reintroducing a merchant discount rate (MDR) on UPI transactions for large merchants with a turnover above ₹1-1.5 crore and for transactions exceeding ₹2,000.

all_candidates.topic: Are AI-driven 'silent layoffs' justifiable in India's IT sector?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Reports this week (July 5-12, 2026) indicate India's IT sector could see up to 35,000 job cuts in 2026 through 'silent layoffs,' driven by AI adoption.

all_candidates.topic: Should influencers be legally held accountable for misleading claims?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Around July 16, 2026, Nagpur Cyber Police booked four social media influencers for allegedly spreading misleading claims about ethanol fuel and defaming Union Minister Nitin Gadkari.

all_candidates.topic: Was cancelling UGC NET the right decision to ensure fair exams?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 13, 2026, the Ministry of Education cancelled the UGC NET examination after intelligence reports suggested irregularities in its conduct.

all_candidates.topic: Should fuel prices reflect global crude price drops faster?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 17, 2026, petrol and diesel prices in India remained largely unchanged despite global crude oil prices settling lower last week.

all_candidates.topic: Is the cooling hiring outlook a concern for India's job market?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A report from June 9, 2026, indicated that Indian employers adopted a cautious hiring stance for the July-September quarter, with a moderated net employment outlook.

all_candidates.topic: Will the India-UK trade deal benefit ordinary Indians?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The India-U.K. Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement (CETA) came into force on July 15, 2026, aiming to eliminate tariffs on about 90% of UK goods entering India and offering duty-free access for nearly 99% of Indian exports.

all_candidates.topic: Is India's first hydrogen train a game-changer for public transport?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 17, 2026, PM Modi flagged off India's first hydrogen train, marking a major step towards green and sustainable mobility for Indian Railways.

all_candidates.topic: Is the recent increase in passport fees justified?
all_candidates.news_anchor: From July 1, 2026, the Ministry of External Affairs increased service fees for normal and Tatkaal passports.

all_candidates.topic: Should Aadhaar email updates always be free for all citizens?
all_candidates.news_anchor: From July 1, 2026, the Aadhaar linked email updating facility became temporarily available without any charges.

all_candidates.topic: Should India prioritize E85 fuel rollout over E20 expansion?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 10, 2026, reports indicated the Centre is planning to introduce E85 fuel at a price ₹20 lower than E20 petrol.

all_candidates.topic: Should India strictly enforce the ban on forced labor imports?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India prohibited the import of goods produced using forced labor, with the new rules taking effect in 30 days, as announced around July 14-16, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Will new railway booking rules truly simplify travel for passengers?
all_candidates.news_anchor: From July 1, 2026, new rules for railway bookings came into effect, aiming to make trip planning easier.

all_candidates.topic: Are the new windfall tax changes fair to Indian oil companies?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Effective July 16, 2026, India increased windfall taxes on exports of diesel and aviation turbine fuel (ATF) while lowering the levy on petrol exports.

all_candidates.topic: Will new RBI rules effectively stop mis-selling of financial products?
all_candidates.news_anchor: From July 1, 2026, the RBI introduced very strict safety guidelines to prevent the mis-selling of financial products by banks.

all_candidates.topic: Should clean energy firms be penalized for unused grid capacity?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Around July 11-13, 2026, India's energy regulator directed clean energy companies to either surrender transmission rights or provide higher bank guarantees if they fail to generate power.

all_candidates.topic: Is increasing India's AI compute capacity a wise government investment?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 13, 2026, Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw stated India would augment its computing capacity to support the growing AI ecosystem.

all_candidates.topic: Will GSTR-3B ITC locking simplify GST compliance for businesses?
all_candidates.news_anchor: From July 2026, Phase 2 of GSTR-3B hard locking is expected, where Input Tax Credit (ITC) reporting will be linked to GSTR-2B data, making GST filing stricter.

all_candidates.topic: Is restructuring tax administration essential for better GST implementation?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Around July 9-15, 2026, the Indian government reportedly prepared plans for a major restructuring of the tax administration, including the CBEC, for a smoother GST rollout.

eligible_candidates.news_anchor: The National Testing Agency (NTA) released the NEET Re-exam results on July 16-17, 2026, with 11.21 lakh candidates qualifying.
